rationale: Elec. Code §254.095 governs campaign finance reporting thresholds for officeholders. It is wholly unrelated to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. No conflict exists.
quote: If at the end of any reporting period prescribed by this subchapter an officeholder who is required to file a report with an authority other than the commission has not accepted political contributions that in the aggregate exceed $500 or made political expenditures that in the aggregate exceed $500, the officeholder is not required to file a report covering that period.
_note: No relationship between the proposed homestead exemption increase and campaign finance reporting rules.
